zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Houghton II於1192年出生在英國藍卡爾霍頓 白 沃林頓時，他的父親Adam de Hoghton18歲，母親Miss. Bussel42歲。他和Agnes至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1283年在他的家鄉享年91歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Houghton II was born in 1192, in Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam de Hoghton, was 18 and his mother, Miss. Bussel, was 42. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Agnes. He died in 1283, in his hometown, at the age of 91, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Houghton II est né en 1192, à Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Hoghton, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Miss. Bussel, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Agnes. Il est décédé en 1283, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Houghton II 1192 in Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Hoghton 18 und seine Mutter Miss. Bussel 42. Er hatte mit Agnes mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1283 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Houghton II è nato il nel 1192 nel Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Adam de Hoghton, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Miss. Bussel, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Agnes. Morì nel 1283, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Houghton II(이)가 1192년 영국 랭카실르 허그h턴 비 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Hoghton(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Miss. Bussel(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Houghton II родился в 1192 г. в местности хоугтон би варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Hoghton было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Miss. Bussel, 42. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Agnes. Он умер в 1283 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия.
